title: IR - Industrials, Shunters & More
description: Various british locomotives for Immersive Railroading, covering a wide variety of purposes
body:
**This pack only works with the Immersive Railroading mod.** British Locomotives of varying purposes for Immersive Railroading. This pack adds:
- LMS 2MT Tank
- Kerr Stuart SG 90HP
- LMS Armstrong Whitworth Diesel Shunter
- British Railways Class 04
- North Eastern Railway E1
- L&YR Class 21 "Pug"
- Hibberd Planet Shunter
- Port Talbot Cooke 0-8-2
- Kerr Stuart Victory Class
- BP Industrial Garratt
